overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Star Citizen showing the player character navigating the Lorville spaceport. The player places cargo on a spacecraft, walks through industrial landing bay corridors, exits into a neon-lit transit terminal, and interacts with a Fleet Manager terminal to retrieve a ship.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft landing bay with hazard markings

events.description: placing cargo box with red warning lights onto the spacecraft
begins walking away from ship into the landing bay corridor

agents.ego_description: placing a cargo box on the ship then turning to walk into the landing bay

entered.detail: metallic spacecraft exterior with orange glowing panels
black container with red warning lights being placed on the ship
grey industrial flooring with yellow and black hazard stripes
large structural supports in the landing bay

segments.scene_description: The player is in a spacecraft landing bay, placing a cargo box with red lights onto a ship. After placing the cargo, the player turns and begins walking toward the corridor entrance, leaving the ship behind.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the exit point

entered.detail: grey metal walls with pipes and industrial detailing
yellow illuminated signage hanging from ceiling
exposed ventilation and cable conduits running overhead
green illuminated sign reading LANDING BAY ARRIVAL

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and exposed piping. Yellow and green illuminated signs mark the path toward the landing bay exit.

events.description: interacting with access terminal to unlock the exit door
exit door opens revealing the transit hall beyond

agents.ego_description: using the access terminal to open the exit door

entered.detail: large metal security doors with X-bracing pattern
green-lit control panel for door access
wall signage reading LANDING BAY EXIT POINT 01

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a security door marked Exit Point 01 and interacts with the access terminal. The large metal doors slide open, revealing the bright transit hall beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit terminal with neon signage and rental services

events.description: exiting industrial corridor into the main transit terminal hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the transit hall passing rental services and large signage

notable_agents.action: standing near the rental counter in the distance

entered.detail: large illuminated letters spelling LORVILLE on the wall
backlit signage for vehicle rental service
geometric white neon light fixtures hanging from ceiling
yellow seating area for waiting passengers

segments.scene_description: The player enters a spacious transit terminal with high ceilings and dramatic neon lighting. Large signage welcomes visitors to Lorville, with rental services visible along the walls and scattered NPCs walking through the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: fleet management terminal with upper observation catwalk

events.description: activating the Fleet Manager terminal to access ship retrieval interface

agents.ego_description: standing at the Fleet Manager terminal reviewing the ship retrieval interface

notable_agents.action: walking along the upper catwalk above the terminal area

entered.detail: yellow and black terminal kiosk with interactive screen
elevated walkway with railing where NPCs are walking
large display showing FLEET MANAGER interface with ship list

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Fleet Manager terminal in the ship retrieval area. NPCs walk along the upper catwalk overhead as the player activates the terminal, bringing up the ship management interface on the screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the utilitarian confines of a spacecraft landing bay into the expansive, neon-lit atmosphere of a futuristic transit terminal. It begins with the player placing a red-lit cargo box onto a ship before turning away to navigate a narrow industrial corridor lined with metal walls, exposed piping, and glowing yellow and green directional signs. As the camera approaches a security door marked Exit Point 01, the player interacts with an access terminal, causing the heavy metal doors to slide open and reveal a bright, open hall. The scene then expands into a spacious terminal characterized by high ceilings, dramatic neon lighting, and large Lorville welcome signage while NPCs move through the rental service area. Finally, the camera moves toward the ship retrieval zone, passing under overhead catwalks to activate a Fleet Manager terminal and bring up the ship management interface.
